journalName: RESEARCH ON LANGUAGE AND SOCIAL INTERACTION
raw_title: Morally-preferred contrasts in troubles talk complaints
title_en: Morally-preferred contrasts in troubles talk complaints
title_zh: 麻烦谈话抱怨中的道德偏好对比
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨人们在谈论麻烦或抱怨时，如何通过对比来展示道德偏好。例如，在抱怨中，人们可能会将自己或他人的行为与道德标准进行比较，以强调某些行为更可取或更正确。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how people use contrasts to show moral preferences when talking about troubles or making complaints. For example, in complaints, individuals might compare their own or others' actions to moral standards to highlight what is more desirable or correct.
research_direction_zh: 该研究属于语言与社会互动领域，关注日常对话中道德表达和抱怨行为的分析，旨在理解人们如何通过语言构建和传达道德判断。
research_direction_en: This research falls within the field of language and social interaction, focusing on the analysis of moral expressions and complaint behaviors in everyday conversations, aiming to understand how people construct and convey moral judgments through language.
